name: IBM Ships First 64-bit RS/6000 Server — Aberdeen Group Announcement Profile (1997)
description: Structured archival data package derived from Aberdeen Group analyst Tom Willmott's 1997 announcement profile of IBM's RS/6000 S70 (Raven), the first 64-bit RS/6000 server using the RS64 (Apache) processor, contextualizing IBM's Unix market position and 1997 product strategy.

creator.name: Aberdeen Group, Inc.
creator.address: One Boston Place, Boston, Massachusetts 02108 USA
